title: Product Manager - AI/ML
description: Join our Product team to drive the development of AI-powered features that will transform how our users interact with our platform. You'll work closely with engineering, design, and data science teams to bring innovative AI/ML products to market.
content:
Requirements:
• 4+ years of product management experience
• Experience with AI/ML products or features
• Strong analytical and data-driven decision making skills
• Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities
• Experience with agile development methodologies
• Technical background with ability to work closely with engineering teams

Qualifications:
• MBA or advanced degree preferred
• Experience at a tech startup or high-growth company
• Knowledge of machine learning concepts and applications
• Experience with product analytics tools (Mixpanel, Amplitude, etc.)
• Previous experience launching 0-to-1 products

Benefits:
• Competitive base salary plus equity
• Premium health insurance (100% covered)
• Flexible PTO and sabbatical options
• $3,000 annual learning and development budget
• Top-tier equipment and home office setup
• Quarterly team offsites
• Stock option program with early exercise
